2603.17357.title: WebPII: Benchmarking Visual PII Detection for Computer-Use Agents
2603.17357.paper_summary: Computer use agents create new privacy risks: training data collected from real websites inevitably contains sensitive information, and cloud-hosted inference exposes user screenshots. Detecting personally identifiable information in web screenshots is critical for privacy-preserving deployment, but no public benchmark exists for this task. We introduce WebPII, a fine-grained synthetic benchmark of 44,865 annotated e-commerce UI images designed with three key properties: extended PII taxonomy including transaction-level identifiers that enable reidentification, anticipatory detection for partially-filled forms where users are actively entering data, and scalable generation through VLM-based UI reproduction. Experiments validate that these design choices improve layout-invariant detection across diverse interfaces and generalization to held-out page types. We train WebRedact to demonstrate practical utility, more than doubling text-extraction baseline accuracy (0.753 vs 0.357 mAP@50) at real-time CPU latency (20ms). We release the dataset and model to support privacy-preserving computer use research.
2603.17357.paper_summary_zh: 電腦使用代理創造了新的隱私風險：從真實網站收集的訓練數據不可避免地包含敏感信息，而雲端托管的推斷則暴露了用戶的截圖。檢測網頁截圖中的個人可識別信息對於隱私保護的部署至關重要，但目前尚無公共基準可供此任務使用。我們推出了WebPII，一個細粒度的合成基準，包含44,865張標註的電子商務用戶界面圖像，設計時考慮了三個關鍵特性：擴展的PII分類法，包括使重新識別成為可能的交易級別標識符、對用戶正在積極輸入數據的部分填寫表單的預測性檢測，以及通過基於VLM的用戶界面重現進行可擴展生成。實驗驗證了這些設計選擇改善了跨多樣化界面的佈局不變檢測以及對保留頁面類型的泛化。我們訓練了WebRedact以展示實用性，在實時CPU延遲（20毫秒）下，文本提取基準準確率提高了超過一倍（0.753對比0.357 mAP@50）。我們發布了數據集和模型，以支持隱私保護的計算機使用研究。
2603.17357.author: Nathan Zhao et.al.
